extra: export DISPLAY=:99 && MEWIN=$(xdotool search --name 'MetaEditor' | head -1) && echo "MetaEditor window: $MEWIN" && xdotool windowactivate --sync $MEWIN 2>&1 && sleep 2 && xdotool windowfocus --sync $MEWIN 2>&1 && sleep 1 && echo 'Opening file...' && xdotool key --clearmodifiers ctrl+o && sleep 3 && xdotool type --clearmodifiers 'C:\Program Files\MetaTrader 5\MQL5\Experts\PropFirmBot\PropFirmBot.mq5' && sleep 1 && xdotool key Return && sleep 3 && echo 'Compiling with F7...' && xdotool key --clearmodifiers F7 && sleep 20 && echo '=== CHECK .ex5 ===' && ls -la '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/'*.ex5 2>/dev/null && echo 'COMPILE SUCCESS!!!' || echo 'STILL NO .ex5'
